metadata.description: PDF creation/extraction libraries plus accessibility and release-quality guidance.

nodejs_libraries.name: pdf-lib
nodejs_libraries.relevance: Create and modify PDFs in JavaScript/TypeScript (forms, pages, attachments).

nodejs_libraries.name: PDFKit
nodejs_libraries.relevance: Generate PDFs programmatically in Node.js with low-level layout control.

python_libraries.name: pypdf Documentation
python_libraries.relevance: Manipulate PDFs in Python (merge/split/rotate, metadata, encryption).

python_libraries.name: pdfplumber
python_libraries.relevance: Extract text/tables from PDFs in Python (OCR-free extraction patterns).

python_libraries.name: ReportLab Documentation
python_libraries.relevance: Generate complex PDFs in Python (tables, charts, pagination).

python_libraries.name: FPDF2 Documentation
python_libraries.relevance: Modern successor to FPDF with Unicode support, improved image handling, HTML rendering.

python_libraries.name: Borb Documentation
python_libraries.relevance: Pure Python PDF library for creating and manipulating PDFs with interactive elements.

python_libraries.name: WeasyPrint Documentation
python_libraries.relevance: CSS3-based HTML to PDF conversion without browser dependency.

python_libraries.name: Camelot Documentation
python_libraries.relevance: PDF table extraction with Lattice (bordered) and Stream (borderless) modes.

accessibility_and_quality.name: Creating accessible PDFs in Adobe Acrobat
accessibility_and_quality.relevance: Practical PDF accessibility guidance: tagging, reading order, alt text, checks.

accessibility_and_quality.name: Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.2 (W3C Recommendation)
accessibility_and_quality.relevance: Accessibility baseline; relevant when PDFs are used for regulated/enterprise contexts.

accessibility_and_quality.name: EN 301 549 (Accessibility requirements for ICT products and services)
accessibility_and_quality.relevance: Common EU-aligned accessibility requirements referenced in procurement and compliance programs.

accessibility_and_quality.name: PDF/UA (Universal Accessibility) resources
accessibility_and_quality.relevance: PDF accessibility standard and ecosystem resources (useful for understanding tagged PDF requirements).

accessibility_and_quality.name: PDF/A (Archival) resources
accessibility_and_quality.relevance: Archival PDF guidance (PDF/A) for long-term retention and reproducible rendering.

accessibility_and_quality.name: PDF Association
accessibility_and_quality.relevance: Industry resources on PDF standards and accessibility practices (use for deeper dives).

accessibility_and_quality.name: veraPDF
accessibility_and_quality.relevance: Open-source validator for PDF/A conformance; useful when archiving or compliance requires PDF/A.

accessibility_and_quality.name: Section508.gov
accessibility_and_quality.relevance: US federal accessibility guidance often referenced in procurement and compliance.
